title: Yakuza is getting another live-action adaptation, because the third time has to be the charm
author: Grant St. Clair
summary: Given how much the Yakuza game series borrows from classic yakuza film, to then turn around and make a film adaptation of that feels a little like a disco-suited snake eating its own tail. Not that it's stopped people from trying, though: Takashi Miike himself made an okay movie out of the first game in 2007, and Amazon made that same game into an absolu
